calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:59am
JPT David H.S. Commins, clerk Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Limited Scope Attorney Paul Silver, SBN# 62788 appears on behalf of Appellants, Sanderlin Eng and Tony Yee. Also present is Preston Yee, son of Appellants. Respondent, Declan Treanor in pro per. Also present is wife of Declan Treanor, Marjorie Sullivan. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from JPT Commins.

Exhibits received:
EXRA: Green hanging file folder with documentation/evidence -- green folder given back, documents retained.
EXRB: Video evidence viewed (2 clips)-- not retained

EXA1: Photos and summary of descriptions
EXA2: Brief of Defendants
EXA3: Individual photo of house
EXA4: 2 Photos of the drain construction
Appellant photos returned
